name: Telaga Punggur Ferry Terminal
review_text:
"I am writing this to warn other international travelers to be extremely cautious when purchasing tickets at this terminal. My husband and I had a very stressful experience due to a complete lack of helpfulness and communication at the ticket counter.
I came prepared with the exact name of my resort, the destination (Tanjung Pinang), and a Google Maps image showing exactly where we needed to go. While I certainly do not expect everyone to speak English, I even used a translator app on my phone to be as clear as possible. The staff member barely looked at me, refused to engage with the translator or the map, and acted as though I was a major inconvenience.
Despite my best efforts to be clear, we were sold tickets to Tanjung Uban instead of Tanjung Pinang. This lack of attention meant we ended up on the wrong side of Bintan Island, resulting in a 350,000 IDR taxi fare and hours of lost travel time. In this day and age, with so many translation tools available, there is no reason for such a total breakdown in service. I hope management trains their staff to better assist tourists who are trying to communicate. Please double-check your physical ticket destination before leaving the window!"
label: Negatif
